description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Bone_Segmentation".

ui_guidance.title: Create Bone Segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Switch to Segment Editor module and create a new segmentation named 'Bone_Segmentation'.

description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Bone_Segment".

ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Add' to create a new segment and rename it to 'Bone_Segment'.

description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.

description: In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Keep largest island" option.

description: In the "Bone segmentation" section, select the segment node.

description: Click the "3D Reconstruction" button.

ui_guidance.instruction: Click the '3D Reconstruction' button.

description: Manually adjust the 3D view to get the best angle for placing the fiducial point on the glenoid cavity surface.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust View for Fiducial Placement
ui_guidance.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to get a clear angle of the glenoid cavity surface.

description: In the "Markups" module, click "Point List" to create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named "Prosthesis_center_point".

ui_guidance.title: Create Prosthesis Center Point
ui_guidance.instruction: Switch to Markups module, click 'Point List', and create a fiducial node named 'Prosthesis_center_point'.

description: Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".

ui_guidance.title: Place Prosthesis Center Point
ui_guidance.instruction: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the center point.

interaction_descriptor.placement_instructions: Click on the glenoid cavity surface in the 3D view to place the point.

ui_guidance.title: Place Prosthesis Center Point
ui_guidance.instruction: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the center point.

operation_descriptions: Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".

description: In the "Planning point" section, select the MarkupsFiducial node.

ui_guidance.instruction: Select the MarkupsFiducial node you just created.
